Home / Fortnite / Availability / Unreleased Content / Unreleased Cosmetics / Cosmetic Surveys

Cosmetic Surveys

Overview

This article contains unreleased content that may be available in the future.
The content on this page is currently present in the game's files but is not accessible by normal means at this time.

Every few months, Epic Games will send a survey to the players, featuring concept art for possible future cosmetic items. They can take weeks, months, or even years to be added.

Rules

Rules[]

  • On each page you will be shown 4 character outfits. You may have to scroll to the right to see the rest.
  • On the top of each character outfit there is a button to indicate the outfit was your favorite of the set and on the bottom there is a button to indicate that outfit was your least favorite.
  • Please select the favorite button on top of the character outfit that is your favorite and the least favorite button under the outfit that is your least favorite from each set.
  • Only one favorite and one least favorite can be selected in each set.
  • Once you have made decision and selected Next for a set. You will not be able to go back.

Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Toon Bomber is currently the survey Outfit that took the longest to be added, with 4 years and 8 months of difference between her survey and Update v40.40.
  • Glumbunny's ID existed 2 years prior to her survey, which implies that some of these Outfits may be older than they seem to be.
  • Some Outfits may change greatly from their survey concepts into their 3D models. These changes do not come from the 3D artists but from Epic Games themselves.[5]

Sandro Silva: sadly, we do have NDA's and I was just executing in 3D concepts that were sent to us, things end up different sometimes from the Concept, because the Client has the final saying on everything, and they try to do what they believe will make these assets stand out and reflect their vision of the project
